positions.halal_note: URGENT: Check Musaffa before order fills. Pre-revenue biotech, verify debt structure.
positions.notes: 6 shares at $42 limit order. Entry 26.7% above original $34.04 target — price ran up. CEO sold 18,500 shares under 10b5-1 (pre-scheduled, not a signal). NEJM Phase 3: proteinuria -46% vs placebo. 14 analysts Strong Buy avg $78. Rejection risk: stock could gap to $10-15 (typical biotech CRL). At approved TP2 $78 → position worth $468 (+$216). Binary event: plan no add after PDUFA.
